docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
